prompt: A haunting, high-concept editorial photograph of a vast, ancient stone library. Thousands of books line the walls, but the pages of the books are disintegrating into fine white sand that flows onto the floor like a silent hourglass. In the center, a single empty chair sits in a shafts of dusty sunlight. No text, no charts, no labels. Cinematic lighting, deep shadows, 8k resolution, professional magazine cover aesthetic.
dataset_name: UNESCO Atlas of the World's Languages in Danger
insight: 40% of the world's languages are endangered; their loss represents the silent disintegration of unique human knowledge systems.
